Headline: 111th/Throop Temporary Reroute near 111th/Throop
ShortDescription: 111 King Dr/111th rr EB via 119th, Ashland, 115th & Halsted; WB via 111th, Halsted, 115th, Marshfield, then into terminal due to construction nr 111th/Throop.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#111 King Drive/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions. Buses will operate as follows:

Eastbound buses will operate via 119th, Ashland, 115th, Halsted, then resume their normal route.

Westbound buses will operate via 111th, Halsted, 115th, Marshfield, then into the terminal.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near 111th/Throop.

Headline: #82 Kimball/Homan Temporary Reroute at Homan/Washington
ShortDescription: 82 Kimball/Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Homan, Madison, Kedzie, Franklin, then resume their normal route on Homan/Washington.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#82 Kimball/Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Homan, Madison, Kedzie, Franklin, Homan, then over normal route, due to street blockage near Homan/Washington.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #4 Cottage Grove Temporary Northbound Reroute near 87th/Cottage Grove.
ShortDescription: Northbound 4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near 87th/Cottage Grove.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted via Cottage Grove, 87th, King Drive, 83rd, Cottage Grove and over normal route, due to street blockage near 87th/Cottage Grove.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
